question.label: Landing check-in
question.name: What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Riley?
question.description: Opens with a safe context-setting check-in so Riley can name what feels most salient in week two.

answer: I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.

assessment.note: He sounds comfortable with the codebase itself but explicitly unsure how decisions get made, which is a mild clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Decision-making map
new_queue.name: When you say 'how decisions are really made here,' what feels most unclear?

new_queue.label: Ownership edges
new_queue.name: Where do the ownership boundaries still feel fuzzy to you?

new_queue.label: Good call line
new_queue.name: What feels like a safe call for you to make on your own right now?

new_queue.label: Missing context
new_queue.name: What are you still waiting to understand before you change an architecture assumption?

new_queue.label: Decision risk
new_queue.name: Where does the current design feel riskiest to you?

new_queue.label: Support network
new_queue.name: Who would you want to pull in first when you need context fast?

new_queue.label: Next support
new_queue.name: What would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.
I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.
